heroSub: Madeira trail status, live weather at each trailhead and the official booking — one tap.
note_oneway: Pedra Rija → Pico Ruivo section is one-way
note_pr1pass: Included in the PR1 ticket (€10.50) — no extra fee
pr1_ticket_included: Included in the PR1 ticket (€10.50) — no extra fee
note_bypass: Controlled one-way: out along the levada, back via the bypass
note_landslide: Closed: landslide between Ribeiro Frio and Lamaceiros
note_km35: Passable only from Boca da Corrida to km 3.5 (Relvinhas)
secretKicker: Secret of the week · from a local
dmTitle: Live like a local in Funchal
dmText: If the island has already won you over: there is a way to own your own apartment in Funchal — cooperative, step by step. The full story is in the SeedWave Hub.
